title: US Strike on IRGC Proxy Depot
description: B-2 strike targeting IRGC-affiliated weapons depot near Iraqi border crossing. Multiple secondary explosions reported.

title: IDF Airstrike — Hezbollah Cache
description: Precision strike on underground munitions storage linked to Hezbollah rocket program.

title: Iranian Ballistic Missile Launch
description: IRGC test-fires medium-range ballistic missile. Assessed as signaling response to US carrier deployment.

title: Drone Swarm — Red Sea Shipping
description: Houthi drone attack on commercial container vessel. USS Gravely intercepts 6 of 8 drones. Partial hull damage.

title: US Navy Intercept — Strait of Hormuz
description: USS Abraham Lincoln strike group intercepts IRGC fast-attack vessels harassing commercial traffic. No shots fired.

title: IDF Strike — Natanz Adjacent Site
description: Reported Israeli strike on SAM battery adjacent to Natanz enrichment complex. Iran denies damage to nuclear facilities.

title: IRGC Drone Attack — Erbil Airbase
description: IRGC-linked group launches drone barrage at US facilities. Two intercepted; one impacts logistics building.

title: US CENTCOM Strike Package
description: Multi-aircraft strike package targeting Iranian-backed militia command nodes. Four separate aim-points engaged.
